## What does this PR do?

<!-- One sentence summary -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New command (`feat:`)
- [ ] Command improvement (`feat:` or `fix:`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Other (`chore:`, `refactor:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] New commands follow the structure in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Multi-cloud examples included where applicable (AWS, GCP, Azure)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Safety checks, pre-checks, or rollback steps included for deployment commands
- [ ] Tested locally by running the command in Claude Code
